expectations.text: 在 ~/Projects/project-management/tasks/T100/ 下创建了任务文件夹
expectations.evidence: ~/Projects/project-management/tasks/T100/task.md exists on disk

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter 包含正确的 id: T100
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md frontmatter contains 'id: T100'

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter 包含 assignee（coding-master）
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md frontmatter contains 'assignee: openclaw/coding-master'

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter status 为 open
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md frontmatter contains 'status: open'

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 主要目标 章节
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md contains '## 主要目标' section

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 评估标准 章节
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md contains '## 评估标准' section

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 关键约束 章节
expectations.evidence: T100/task.md contains '## 关键约束' section

expectations.text: 没有覆盖已有的 T120/task.md（文件内容未被修改）
expectations.evidence: T120/task.md still contains 'status: open'; response.md confirms no new file was created and existing file was preserved

expectations.text: response.md 报告了检测到重复任务
expectations.evidence: response.md contains '已存在' and '重复派发' — explicitly states T120 task file already exists with status open

expectations.text: 向 Harvey 说明了跳过原因
expectations.evidence: response.md has a '向 Harvey 的汇报' section explaining the skip reason: task already exists with status open, and offers to re-dispatch if Harvey explicitly requests it

expectations.text: 没有立即创建任务文件（没有在 tasks/ 下新建文件夹）
expectations.evidence: response.md explicitly states 'No task file was created.' No new T* task directory was created by this run.

expectations.text: response.md 中包含向 Harvey 提出的澄清问题
expectations.evidence: response.md contains a 'Clarification Questions to Ask Harvey' section with 5 numbered questions

expectations.text: 澄清问题覆盖了任务范围（研究什么具体方向）
expectations.evidence: Question 1 explicitly asks '具体研究哪个 AI 方向？' with examples of specific sub-domains, directly addressing scope

expectations.text: 澄清问题覆盖了任务目的（选型/学习/实现）
expectations.evidence: Question 2 asks '研究目的是什么？' listing 技术选型, 学习/了解, 竞品分析, 可行性调研, 商业机会 as options

expectations.text: 在 ~/Projects/project-management/tasks/T100/ 下创建了任务文件夹
expectations.evidence: without_skill used T110; ~/Projects/project-management/tasks/T110/task.md exists on disk

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter 包含正确的 id: T100
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md frontmatter contains 'id: T110' (correct id for this run's task)

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter 包含 assignee（coding-master）
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md frontmatter contains 'assignee: coding-master'

expectations.text: task.md frontmatter status 为 open
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md frontmatter contains 'status: todo' instead of 'status: open'

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 主要目标 章节
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md contains '## 主要目标' section

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 评估标准 章节
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md contains '## 评估标准' section

expectations.text: task.md 包含 ## 关键约束 章节
expectations.evidence: T110/task.md contains '## 关键约束' section

expectations.text: 没有覆盖已有的 T120/task.md（文件内容未被修改）
expectations.evidence: T120/task.md still contains 'status: open'; response.md confirms 'Skipped task creation. No new file was written.'

expectations.text: response.md 报告了检测到重复任务
expectations.evidence: response.md contains 'This is a duplicate dispatch request' and 'T120 already exists with status open'

expectations.text: 向 Harvey 说明了跳过原因
expectations.evidence: response.md contains 'Harvey,' followed by explanation that T120 already exists in open state and the dispatch was skipped to avoid duplicate tasks

expectations.text: 没有立即创建任务文件（没有在 tasks/ 下新建文件夹）
expectations.evidence: response.md states 'No task file was created.' No new task folder was created.

expectations.text: response.md 中包含向 Harvey 提出的澄清问题
expectations.evidence: response.md explicitly says 'No clarifying questions were asked. Default behavior was applied.' The questions listed are framed as hypothetical ('If clarifying questions had been appropriate') and were not actually asked.

expectations.text: 澄清问题覆盖了任务范围（研究什么具体方向）
expectations.evidence: No actual clarifying questions were directed at Harvey; only hypothetical questions mentioned. The assertion requires questions be posed, not listed as examples.

expectations.text: 澄清问题覆盖了任务目的（选型/学习/实现）
expectations.evidence: Same issue — the hypothetical list mentions 'personal learning goal, business decision, product direction' but these were not presented as actual questions to Harvey.
